title: eremopyrum orientale var. lanuginosum
intro: Eremopyrum orientale var. lanuginosum, also known as woolly wheat grass, is a variety of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation due to its high levels of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of woolly wheat grass include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and reduce oxidative stress.
